IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (17688766.pdf)
SUMMARY: IT Director/Manager with extensive experience in network operations, leveraging expertise in organization growth and problem solving. Driven, professional and detailed-oriented with the proven ability to plan, design and implement technical systems, improve process flow and administer departmental budgets.
SKILLS: Accounting, Active Directory, anti-virus, Apple, Arcserve, Audio, Backup, BGP, Cisco Routers, Citrix, hardware, contracts, DHCP, disaster recovery, DNS, Firewalls, FTP, HP, imaging, IP, LAN, leadership, Lotus Notes, Mac, Microsoft Windows 7, 8.1, 10, Server 2008 R2 & 2012, network administration, Nas, Network, Novell servers, Operating Systems, OS, PCI, policies, Project leader, proposals, real estate, risk management, SAN, server configuration, SQL, SSL, Switches, Symantec, technical support, Trend, troubleshooting, UNIX, upgrading, Video, VPN, WAN
